# MAP FILES STRUCTURE

SWOS .MAP files contain the pitch graphic representation info. Each file has two sections: HEADER and TILES

## HEADER SECTION

55 rows
42 columns

each cell is 4 bytes and contains tile index
given the 4 bytes (abcd):

- a and b are always 0
- d is 0 or 128
- tile_index = 2 * c + (d == 0 ? 0 : 1)

## TILES SECTION

each tile is 16 * 8 bytes

# RAW EXAMPLES

In this folder you can found simple RAW interleade file that can be converted into MAP.
For convenience reasons there are also the BMP and IFF format of the same file.

TILE.RAW (interleaved) 16 x 16 px, 4 bitplanes

00000001 11111111 11111111 11111111 00000000 00000000 11111111 11111111
00000000 11111111 11111111 11111111 00000000 00000000 11111111 11111111
00000000 01111111 11111111 11111111 00000000 00000000 11111111 11111111
